game_name: Boogerman: A Pick and Flick Adventure

audio_identity.overall_style: platformer soundtrack with gross-out themed sound design
distinctive_elements: burp/fart sound effects as primary attack ammunition
SNES version features stronger bass sound compared to Genesis version
improved voice clips in SNES version
influences: Disney's Aladdin soundtrack style (parody element noted in gameplay)

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Boogerman SNES article
Wikipedia - Boogerman: A Pick and Flick Adventure
notes: Limited audio documentation available. SNES version composer Roy Wilkins differs from Genesis version composer Matt Furniss. Unused voice clips and music documented but not currently triggered in SNES version gameplay. Sound test accessible via cheat code reveals additional audio assets.
